# Model strategy

## Treat model choice as a workflow decision

Use model comparison when quality, speed, context handling, or coding style materially affect the engineering outcome.

## Compare models for

- planning quality
- code transformation quality
- review quality
- long-context discovery work
- explanation and teaching quality
- speed-to-acceptable-output

## Practical pattern

1. define one task type
2. define a common prompt or rubric
3. run the comparison on representative examples
4. record qualitative and quantitative differences
5. map preferred models to task classes

## Avoid

- comparing models with different prompts or evaluation criteria
- making global model decisions from one-off anecdotal wins
